source_jobs.title: Software Designer
source_jobs.description:
SUMMARY



🤝 You’ll be joining the early design team at Jitter

👩‍💻 You are a hands-on design leader passionate about craft and engineering collaboration to ship exceptional, detail-driven product experiences

📍 Based in Paris (in-person) – relocation packages if needed

🇬🇧 We’re an international team and work in English

💰 80k-95k€ + Stock options / BSPCE – we can go higher for exceptional candidates






💫 WHO WE ARE



Jitter is a fast, simple, and collaborative motion design tool on the web. We help designers create beautiful animations for marketing videos, brand content, apps and websites — and collaborate easily with teammates, clients, and stakeholders. Think “Figma for motion design.”



With over 20,000 creative teams already using Jitter around the world, our next chapter is ambitious: to make motion a foundational layer of every design stack, by building the motion design operating system that will standardize and scale motion across every brand and campaign, from ideation to production, similar to how design systems transformed UI design.



✨ Our mission. Make motion design accessible to all designers.

🔭 Our ambition. Become the leading platform to create animated content.







👋 WHO YOU ARE



You are a hands-on design leader with a deep passion for craft and a strong belief in close collaboration with engineers to bring excellence into every product detail, from high-level user experience to the finest interface interaction. You thrive at the intersection of design and engineering, ensuring that every feature we ship is thoughtful, cohesive, and beautifully executed.



 - 6+ years of experience designing for high-growth startups and/or scale-ups at a senior or director position, with a proven track record of shipping polished, user-centered products

 - Outstanding visual design skills, with strong command of typography, layout, color, and visual hierarchy

 - A sharp eye for design, obsessive attention to detail, and an intuitive sense of what feels right

 - A natural problem-solver who enjoys making the complex feel simple and elegant

 - Deep appreciation for design craft, and a creative sensibility shaped by curiosity across disciplines

 - Experience in motion design (bonus if you’ve used Jitter or explored similar tools)

 - Comfortable working in a fast-paced, iterative environment where speed, autonomy, and high standards go hand in hand






💥 WHAT YOU’LL DO



You’ll be the first software designer to join the product team as we enter the next phase of Jitter’s growth. This is a foundational role, with the mission to own the end-to-end product experience and raise the design quality across every detail of the platform.



 - Own the craft. You’ll be responsible for the full execution of Jitter’s core product design: every pixel, every interaction, every moment of the user journey. You’ll have the authority to challenge assumptions, rethink workflows, and simplify complexity across the interface.

 - Raise the bar. Our goal is to stand shoulder to shoulder with the best-designed products in the world (Apple, Figma, Linear, Framer, etc). You’ll set the standard, push the limits of our craft, and help establish design excellence as a core company value.

 - Shape and grow the Product Design team. You'll play a key role in shaping and scaling the Product Design team from the ground up, from hiring exceptional talent and mentoring designers, to defining strong, cross-functional ways of working across design, product, and engineering.

 - Be part of the bigger picture. You’ll contribute to strategic decisions alongside the CEO, roadmap planning, and long-term product vision.




⏭️ WHAT THIS LOOKS LIKE DAY TO DAY:



 - Evolving the editor by introducing new advanced creative features in the most intuitive way possible. You'll collaborate closely with engineers to invent solutions that feel obvious in hindsight, the kind of solutions people talk about with: "How did no one build this before?"

 - Rede

source_jobs.title: People Lead
source_jobs.description:
SUMMARY

🤝 You’ll be building the People function from scratch at Jitter, alongside with the CEO

🌍 You’ll enable Jitter’s international growth by hiring, developing, and engaging world-class teams

📍 Based in Paris (in-person) – relocation packages if needed

🇬🇧 We’re an international team and work in English

💰 100k–120k€ + equity (BSPCE)




💫 WHO WE ARE

Jitter is a fast, simple, and collaborative motion design tool on the web. We help designers create beautiful animations for marketing videos, brand content, apps and websites — and collaborate easily with teammates, clients, and stakeholders. Think “Figma for motion design.”

With over 20,000 creative teams already using Jitter around the world, our next chapter is ambitious: to make motion a foundational layer of every design stack, by building the motion design operating system that will standardize and scale motion across every brand and campaign, from ideation to production, similar to how design systems transformed UI design.

To support this trajectory, we are looking for our first People Lead, a strategic and hands-on leader who will build, structure the People function, and help shape Jitter’s organisation, culture, and leadership practices for the long term.



✨ Our mission. Make motion design accessible to all designers and creative teams.

🔭 Our ambition. Become the leading platform to create animated content at scale.






👋 WHO YOU ARE

You are a senior People leader with a strong business acumen and a passion for building organizations where people deliver, learn and grow. You combine strategic thinking with hands-on execution, and you’re excited by the challenge of building a People function from the ground up in a fast-growing, international tech company. You are driven to spread and embody Jitter’s culture by genuinely taking care of the team, understanding what motivates individuals, and creating the conditions for people to thrive

You are equally comfortable partnering with founders on organizational design, coaching leaders, rolling up your sleeves to hire top talent, and structuring scalable People processes. You care deeply about culture, achievement, and engagement — and you believe People is a key driver of company growth trajectory.

 - 8+ years of experience in People / Talent roles within Tech or SaaS environments

 - Strong talent acquisition background, with the ability to hire senior, high-impact profiles at scale

 - A structuring experience in designing and running people playbook & processes

 - Comfortable managing HR tools, contractors, and service providers

 - Fluent in English (French is a plus)

 - Curious, pragmatic, data-savvy, and deeply people-oriented.




💥 WHAT YOU’LL DO

You are the first People team member to join Jitter as we enter the next phase of our growth. Reporting directly to the CEO, your mission is to own the people function, enabling the company’s growth while maintaining a high bar for culture, performance, and engagement.

 - Build and lead the People function. You’ll be responsible for defining the People strategy with the CEO, execute it with clear roadmap and structured processes.

 - Hire and scale world-class teams. You act as a bar-raiser in hiring. You’ll design and run a strong hiring engine to support rapid growth. Attract, assess, and hire top-tier talent, coach hiring managers, and ensure a smooth, high-quality candidate experience — all driven by clear data and KPIs.

 - Develop, engage, and retain talent. You’ll create clear growth frameworks so people can learn, perform, and progress at Jitter. You’ll design the whole People journey that will actively nurture a strong, cohesive culture.

 - Run solid People operations. You’ll ensure reliable People Ops foundations as the company scales. Oversee payroll, legal and HR partners, and continuously improve compensation, equity, and compliance frameworks.




👩‍💻 WHAT THIS LOOKS LIKE DAY TO DAY

 - Partnering closely with founders and managers to shape

source_jobs.title: GTM Lead
source_jobs.description:
SUMMARY

🤝 You are a hands-on GTM builder, passionate about customers, efficiency, and craft

📈 You’ll drive Jitter’s growth on the mid-market segment ($2–25k ACV), building a streamlined GTM engine that converts larger teams and expands accounts with low friction

🎯 You’ll be the first GTM hire, working directly with the CEO

📍 Based in Paris (in-person) – Relocation support available

🇬🇧 International team, English-speaking

💰 100-120k€ + equity (BSPCE) – Flexible for exceptional candidates




💫 WHO WE ARE

Jitter is a fast, simple, and collaborative motion design tool on the web. We help designers create engaging animated content for marketing videos, brand, apps and websites — and collaborate easily with teammates, clients, and stakeholders. Think “Figma for motion design.”

With over 20,000 creative teams already using Jitter worldwide and and a clear shift from individual usage to team-wide adoption, our next chapter is ambitious: to make motion a foundational layer of every design stack, and become the content production platform that companies rely on to create, adapt, and ship content at scale, across all formats and platforms.

✨ Our mission. Make motion design accessible to all designers and creative teams.

🔭 Our ambition. Become the leading platform to create animated content at scale.




👋 WHO YOU ARE

You are a hands-on GTM builder with a strong product mindset and a high bar for craft. You enjoy cracking messy GTM problems, rolling up your sleeves to run deals yourself, and then turning what works into systems that scale. You’re driven by efficiency, leverage, and quality, and you care deeply about how creative teams experience the tools they use.

You’ll thrive here if:

 - You have 5+ years of experience across GTM, revenue, or growth in B2B SaaS, with ownership of real outcomes end to end

 - You’ve built or operated low-touch or hybrid GTM motions before (PLG, product-assisted sales, mid-market)

 - You believe great GTM reduces the need for sales by default (fewer calls, demos, manual steps), but you are happy to step in yourself when it clearly pushes a deal forward

 - You’re a builder at heart: resourceful, action-driven, and comfortable creating your own tools, workflows, and experiments (often with AI)

 - You’re obsessed with efficiency and leverage, constantly simplifying, automating, or removing what doesn’t work

 - You’re opinionated and data-driven: you track the right metrics, test quickly, and adjust based on what actually moves conversion and expansion

 - You care deeply about craft and quality, especially when working with designers and creative teams

 - You are fluent in English

Strong bonus if (not required)

 - Experience selling to or working with designers, creative teams, agencies, or studios

 - Firsthand exposure to design-led companies or tools (e.g. early GTM at Figma, Notion, Framer, Linear, Canva, Attio, Clay)

 - Background in business development or partnerships at a design studio or creative agency

Not a fit if

 - You’re only comfortable with classic enterprise sales and long procurement cycles

 - You expect a large sales team, mature processes, or a narrow execution role

 - You prefer managing over building in the early phase




💥 YOUR MISSION

You’ll be the first GTM team member and help us shape our next phase of growth. Reporting directly to the CEO, your mission is to build and own a state-of-the-art mid-market GTM system that converts $2–25k ACV teams and grows them over time, with minimal manual sales work.

 - Generate and convert team deals from inbound, the existing user base (product signals, usage patterns), and targeted outbound (e.g. studios and creative teams)

 - Make these deals fast, profitable, and repeatable – without building a heavy sales org

 - Set teams up for long-term retention and expansion

 - Lay foundations for future enterprise GTM ($75k+), without running it yet

 - Grow and structure the GTM team within 6–9 months

Target: bringing t

notes: Early-stage product company with a focus on motion design tools
